title: Pilosella lasiothrix
intro: Pilosella lasiothrix, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard or Rough Mouse Ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. Traditionally, Pilosella lasiothrix has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Pilosella lasiothrix is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly available in the form of capsules or tinctures for use in traditional and alternative medicine.
